title: Morgan’s Rule Turns Violent
description: On pages 12–15, this part pushes the Shells Town conflict forward as Luffy challenges the fear surrounding Morgan’s Marines.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Sorry, sir! We were careless, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I think I hear voices up there.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: SWINE! DO YOU KNOW HOW LONG I'VE WAITED FOR THIS STATE TO BE FINISHED!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Sorry, sir! I'll pay to have it fixed!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THIS STATE IS LIKE MY PERSON!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: SCRATCHING IT IS THE SAME AS ATTACKING ME!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: LET THIS BE A WARNING TO ALL!

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
